theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist UI
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Nostalgic, warm, playful, highly tactile and interactive
theme_and_archetype.rationale: A childhood photo guessing game needs to feel fun, approachable, and memorable. Combining soft, warm pastel colors (evoking nostalgia and old photos) with neo-brutalist harsh borders and shadows makes it feel like a modern, engaging web game.

headings.usage: Use for game titles, countdown timer, large scores, and winner announcements. Keep tracking tight (tracking-tighter) for massive text.

body.usage: Use for player names, instructions, buttons, and leaderboard details. Nunito provides a soft, rounded, friendly feel that contrasts perfectly with the harsh borders.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter

rules: No generic gray borders. All structural borders must be thick #1A1A1A (border-2 or border-4).
No soft, blurry drop shadows. Use solid, hard shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] or shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#1A1A1A].
Use colors to differentiate players in the lobby (assign random pastel background to each player's avatar card).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Items should feel like tactile physical cards or polaroids laid out on a table.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use max-w-4xl mx-auto for the main game arena. Add thick padding (p-6 to p-12).
spacing_and_layout.cards: Cards must have internal padding of p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision with thick borders.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Use BENTO style grids for the 4 options. grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 or gap-6.

buttons.style: bg-card_peach text-primary border-4 border-primary shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] font-headings uppercase text-xl py-4 px-8 rounded-xl

inputs.style: bg-paper border-4 border-primary p-4 rounded-xl text-xl font-body focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] transition-all

polaroid_image_frame.style: bg-paper border-4 border-primary p-4 pb-16 rounded-md shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#1A1A1A] rotate-[-2deg] hover:rotate-0 transition-transform duration-300 relative max-w-md mx-auto
polaroid_image_frame.description: Used for the childhood photos. Thick white border, much thicker at the bottom, mimicking an old Polaroid. Use aspect-square for the inner image.

lobby_avatar.style: w-16 h-16 rounded-full border-4 border-primary shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#1A1A1A] overflow-hidden bg-card_yellow flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xl

timer_bar.style: h-8 rounded-full border-4 border-primary bg-paper w-full relative overflow-hidden shadow-[inset_0px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)]
timer_bar.fill: h-full bg-card_yellow border-r-4 border-primary origin-left transition-all duration-1000 ease-linear

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast, snappy, zero-smoothing. transition-all duration-150 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: When answering correctly, the chosen button flashes green (bg-correct), others gray out with opacity-50.
motion_and_interactions.timer: The timer bar shrinks linearly. In the last 5 seconds, text pulses red and scales up/down using a custom keyframe animation.
motion_and_interactions.leaderboard: Podium elements slide up from the bottom staggered (3rd, 2nd, 1st) using framer-motion or simple css delays.

hero_decoration.description: Retro polaroid camera to use as a decorative floating element on the landing page.

sample_childhood_photo_1.description: Sample childhood photo for UI mocking/testing.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for any necessary icons (like volume toggle, share link, users icon).

DO NOT use Shadcn UI's default soft minimal styles. You must override the borders, shadows, and radii to match the Neo-brutalist theme (border-4 border-[#1A1A1A], solid #1A1A1A shadows, no blur on shadows).
Build the UI focusing heavily on the physical 'card' or 'polaroid' aesthetic for the main quiz image.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive and informational elements (buttons, inputs, options, share link, start game, scores, player names).
For the background, apply a subtle CSS noise texture or repeating dot grid pattern over the base #F4F0EA color to enhance the retro/tactile feel.
Integrate simple HTML5 Audio elements for the requested nostalgic background music and sound effects (tick, correct, wrong). Keep them togglable via a UI button.
Implement the different distinct game states: Home -> Lobby -> Quiz Round -> Round Result -> Final Leaderboard. Ensure fluid and clear transitions between these states.
